feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: We could be a firestorm
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 769Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Eddie Diaz has spent years pretending he's fine watching Buck build a life with someone else. Buck has spent years pretending that's what he wants. After a close call on a fire scene forces them both to confront what they've been avoiding, years of longing, missed chances, and carefully constructed lies finally go up in smoke. -- Inspired by a song by THE HARA called Firestorm

entry.summary:

entry.title: the stranger that I once loved, the love I can´t leave
entry.summary:
Author: Potatozoo43lamas

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,349Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 1

Summary: Buck and Eddie are two teen girl who first meet at 15 and 14 in Eddies hometown, wen Buck gets send away over the summer to spend some time with her uncle, pester Nash of the town. over the next years she comes back every summer until her last one at 18, tell in her best friend Eddie she can´t ever come back and they will never meat again. Over there next years they go different ways, one balding a life for herself the other barley living. (this summery sucks and I promises the actual story is hopefully better)

entry.title: don't let go
entry.summary:
Author: idyllic_dae

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,670Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 39

Summary: Buck isn't looking, but he can feel the presence of someone else climb in with him. They situate themselves in the narrow space between the center console and the seats. A hand lands on the back of his neck, ensuring he doesn't move from this position. The pressure is firm, but not cruel. "Relax," Red whispers in his ear, low and husky. "Enjoy the ride." Buck hears doors slam and the shifting of gears. The car lurches, and so does his stomach, because it's evident that nobody is going to find him now. Relax? Impossible. He's going to be killed, his body will be buried in the middle of the desert, and he didn't even thank Eddie for the coffee this morning. Or: Because Buck's life can never be simple, he finds himself with a gun pressed against the back of his head, in the middle of a feud that has nothing to do with him, and with five pounds of C-4 strapped to his chest. Somehow, that's not even the worst part.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 186,422Chapters: 46/?Kudos: 112

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: dead reckoning
entry.summary:
Author: sinnabonka

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 58,090Chapters: 9/12Kudos: 106

Summary: Buck steps closer, takes the knife from Eddie’s hand, the movement careful and gentle, and sets it aside. “Hey,” he tilts his head into Eddie’s line of sight. “It’s me. What’s going on?” “You know that thing that’s been going around, about the sun?” “The dimming thing? Eddie, that’s–” “It’s not,” he cuts him off right away. “The sun is losing output, we have data. And not gradually, not in a way that gives us centuries – we’re talking a decade. Two, tops.” Buck leans his hip against the counter beside him, crosses his arms over his chest. “…okay.” “There’s a team that’s been on it and they think they have a lead on a solution. They need someone to go out there and retrieve whatever the thing is and bring it back.” “Why are you telling me this?” Eddie doesn’t have to look, but he does anyway. He owes Buck that much. “It’s going to be a three person crew. A scientist, an engineer, and someone to fly the ship.” The silence sits around Eddie’s neck, drawing tighter with every second that passes. He can see the moment the words land. “And that someone is you.”Or,project Hail Mary AU. (Updated 2 times a week)

entry.title: The Heliophilic Condition
entry.summary:
Author: 2beeautifuul

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,284Chapters: 3/17Kudos: 33

Summary: The odds might actually be in Buck’s favor. It’s all Eddie can hope for. When it comes down to it, Eddie could live a thousand lifetimes and never deserve the love Buck’s given him. In the arena, he’ll fight to keep Buck alive. Because Buck is the best of them. To win the Games is for Buck to survive.  or, Eddie Diaz, Victor of the 69th Hunger Games, prepares for another year of the Games. Little does he know that the Quarter Quell will have devastating consequences. or, the 118 is thrown into the Hunger Games

entry.title: 100 miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: Lyla_Nostra

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,175Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 438

Summary: Buck saved fifteen people before the pacific claimed him. Four days later, he was declared dead. A week later, they buried an empty casket. But Evan Buckley has always been a fighter, and he isn’t done yet. While Eddie struggles to raise Christopher without their anchor, Buck begins a grueling journey back from the dead. Because there is nothing in this world that could stop Buck from coming back to his family.

entry.title: S7 Superwoman: Last Responder
entry.summary:
Author: That_bitch_without_a_life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,717Chapters: 2/7Kudos: 9

Summary: Having not dated anyone in years, and sick of waiting for Eddie to catch a clue, this year is about freedom and experiences for Kara, and maybe a chance to finally leave Krypton in the past. TLDR: this is a female buck fic if she was supergirl, just trust the process. (we're going to get rid of Tommy as soon as possible, this will be Buddie endgame, just not this season)

entry.title: I thought that I heard you laughing
entry.summary:
Author: numberonehangsterfan

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,146Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 7

Summary: Football player Evan Buckley is a running back for the USC Trojans who has a tendency to run fast and think later. During USC's annual rivalry game against the Notre Dame Fighting Irish, a particularly hard tackle sends Buck flying out of bounds and straight into the other team. An unlucky player with strikingly brown eyes doesn't manage to dive out of Buck's path in time.

entry.title: Family Secrets
entry.summary:
Author: MsVortex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,907Chapters: 3/3Kudos: 528

Summary: "Did you know I tried out for the Navy SEALS?" he asked to the room at large, knowing full well he only ever talked about his failed endeavor with Bobby and Eddie. It wasn’t so much the failure to go through with it that had kept him silent, it was what it had brought to light. For once he saw the distaste towards him drop from the Buckley’s faces, they both looked bewildered by his choice of topic. Margaret looked like she was about to interrupt him but he didn’t let her, earning a pointed glare from Phillip for it. "You probably aren't aware what that entails. Sure, everyone has heard of BUD/s. Hell week. The physical requirements. But there's a step before that. They want to see some documents. Your High School Diploma, your last addresses, things like that… most importantly though, they want your birth certificate." Or,There is more than one Buckley Family Secret and Buck is about to reveal the first one.

entry.title: Thoughtless
entry.summary:
Author: Lanam_1313

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,974Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 9

Summary: Eddie says mean things when he's hurtBuck internalizes everything that is ever said to him, even if they aren't true; especially when they're meant to hurt.Maddie is the one that calls Eddie, and when Eddie gets Buck on the phone; he blames Buck.Buck blames himself, too, but having someone confirm it? That settled something cold deep in his chest. Buck is trying his best and everything starts chipping away at him.

entry.title: Operation... Buddie?? Yes
entry.summary:
Author: Lanam_1313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,107Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: The entire 118 can see it, Buck's family can see it, BUCK can see it-Eddie does not.Buck internalizes A LOT, I'm talking A LOT.Athena and Bobby are his non-legal parents.May and Maddie are the best sisters ever; Harry is just kinda there (love him though)Some chapters will JUST be texting and other chapters will be long form/dialogue, it depends on the flow.For example; first chapter is only texting. Second chapter will be the wine night and then Saturday hangout with the Diaz boys before another texting chapter.

entry.title: I can't help but wonder...
entry.summary:
Author: soulfulstiles

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,393Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 79

Summary: Buck lost count of the nightmares. Everytime he closed his eyes, Buck saw Bobby. The captain he admired, the mentor who taught him so much, and the father he loved, Buck kept seeing him. Trapped on the other side of bullet-proof tampered glass, blood dripping from his nose across his graying skin. The pained expression in his watering eyes. "I love you, kid." Buck hadn't said it back. And now, he stood in the L.A. Hospital with his team, begging Steve McGarrett to tell him what in the hell was going on. "Steve," Buck repeated, desperate. "Why are you here?" Steve pursed his lips, nodded a few times, and then let out a deep breath and looked Buck straight in the eyes. "Because when I discover one of the victims of abuse and unlawful science experimentation in a ring of underground labs is the captain of one of my guys, I think I owe it to him to bring him home." OR: Bobby's been trapped in an underground lab for a year. He makes it home to his son.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: "I'll take a chance on leaving, It's that or stay and die"
entry.summary:
Author: Jamez_of_calamity

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,811Chapters: 2/20Kudos: 35

Summary: What if Buck and Eddie had Chris, what if buck ran away stifled by the expectations of motherhood drowning raising a baby alone, what if he then transitioned traveled the world before finding himself at the 118, what if Eddie shows up not recognizing him not knowing he's staring at his son's other fatherWhat if Eddie and Buck had Chris, what if Eddie got a girl he barely knew pregnant, what if they where pressured to keep it, what if he joins the army abandoning her, what if she leaves with just a note and a son for him to raise alone, what if Eddie joins the 118 not knowing he's staring at his son's other father- or a alternate universe where Buck takes Shannons place in the story, angst and chaos ensue

entry.title: Playing House
entry.summary:
Author: kitlikesfoxes

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,833Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 48

Summary: “If we determine that it's not in Theo’s best interest to remain here, he will be moved to another foster home. Likely one with two parents who could devote time to his care.”“Theo will have two parents!” Buck says in a rush, “I’m engaged!”What? Eddie thinks.“Really?” The social worker asks. Eddie can hear the surprise in her voice. “And your fiancée, where is she?” Eddie would very much like to know the same.“Um,” Buck hesitates. “Well, you already met him. It’s… It’s Eddie. Eddie Diaz.”What? What is Buck saying?! OR Buck claims to be engaged to Eddie in order to have a better chance at adopting Theo. He neglects to consult Eddie's thoughts on the matter first though...

entry.title: Meant For Each Other
entry.summary:
Author: freddyfakeman

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,660Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 87

Summary: “18 MONTHS?!” more tears stream down Evan’s face. “Thats way too long, Christopher is 5! We can’t do this to him, he won't even understand.” Evan isn't even sure if he’s even talking to Eddie anymore, he might be yelling at the universe. All he knows is that he’s angry, he can barely remember to brush his teeth in the morning, how is he meant to take care of a 5 year old with CP alone? Now it’s Eddie's turn to cry. It did take him a while to agree to the invitation (which was really an order but he didn't want to go). He reaches out and puts his hand on Evan’s arm but he jerks away. “Ev..” or.. Buck and Eddie are married when Eddie's deployed again. What happens when he meets the 118 and two other friends? (NEW CHAPTER EVERY TUESDAY) PLS IGNORE ALL TYPOS LOL

entry.title: Never Let Buck Play Basketball
entry.summary:
Author: lunababy

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,244Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 117

Summary: Buck is definitely not jealous. He just doesn’t like Tommy. He doesn’t like how he fits into Eddie’s life so easily. He doesn’t like how he’s easy and fun and cool and exciting, and Buck is sure Eddie is going to realize it and Buck is going to be replaced and lose everything. Instead of talking about it, Buck decides that he can be fun too. Then Eddie gets hurt and it’s all his fault. Buck will do anything to be good again so Eddie will forgive him. Even if he hurts himself doing it. Eddie doesn’t realize until it’s too late that Buck wasn’t just acting out, he was scared. And now he’s dropping hard.
